patents.title: Porous iron electrode for multi-day iron-air storage
patents.abstract: A porous iron electrode enables reversible iron oxidation for hundred-hour depth-discharge grid-dispatch storage with alkaline electrolyte.

patents.title: Oxygen electrode stack for long-duration iron-air cells
patents.abstract: Oxygen-electrode architecture for long-duration multi-day iron-air cells with reversible oxidation and grid-dispatch duty cycles.

patents.title: Alkaline electrolyte formulation for iron-air depth discharge
patents.abstract: Electrolyte additives improve reversible iron oxidation stability over hundred-hour discharge for grid-dispatch modules.
